name: curio-corner-commerce
description: Premium handmade crafts eCommerce platform with public storefront and secure admin dashboard.

scripts.build: npm --prefix backend install --package-lock=false --prefer-online --no-audit && npm --prefix frontend install --package-lock=false --prefer-online --no-audit && npm --prefix admin install --package-lock=false --prefer-online --no-audit && npm --prefix frontend run vercel-build && npm --prefix admin run vercel-build && node scripts/copy-admin.cjs
scripts.build:all: npm --prefix frontend run vercel-build && npm --prefix admin run vercel-build && node scripts/copy-admin.cjs
